name: Green Tomato Minced Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the meat with water and simmer until tender.
2. Force the meat, suet, tomatoes, and apples through a coarse food chopper.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except brandy) to the mixture.
4. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
5. Fill 3 hot, sterilized 1-quart jars with the mixture.
6. Place 2 tbsp. brandy on top of each jar, if desired.
7. Seal the jars and store in a cool place.
